value.found_quote: Today we’re launching AgentKit, a complete set of tools for developers and enterprises to build, deploy, and optimize agents.
value.rationale: The page is OpenAI's announcement of AgentKit, describing it as a launched set of tools for building, deploying, and optimizing agents. AgentKit itself is active (launched October 6, 2025), though note that the June 3, 2026 update says certain components (Agent Builder and Evals) are being wound down by November 30, 2026. The core AgentKit offering is described as launched/available, so the claim is substantiated.
